Off Calendar Sep-16-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-08-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO'S unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and a separate proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
